source_title: 08 Niagara/04 Creating Blowing Leaves - Unreal for VFX

evidences.content: so now let's create the blowing leaf particle system from scratch 现在让我们从头开始创建飘落叶子的粒子系统吧 Let me right click in the content browser and let's create a new Niagara system 让我在内容浏览器中右键点击，然后创建一个新的Niagara系统 and we'll create a new system from selected emitters 我们将从选定的发射器创建一个新的系统 which will give us a couple of presets 这将给我们一些预设值 Now let's select blowing particles at the top 现在让我们在顶部选择飘落的粒子 click the little green plus sign and then press finish 点击小绿加号，然后按完成 And then we'll rename this to NSBlowingLeaves01 and then make sure to drag it 然后我们将把它重命名为NSBlowingLeaves01，然后确保拖动它 into the scene so we can see what the default properties are doing 将其拖入场景中，这样我们就可以看到默认属性在做什么 So starting at the top of our system 所以从我们的系统顶部开始 let's check determinism and set that to true 让我们检查确定性并将其设置为true If I check the emitter state 如果我检查发射器状态 we can see that this will just loop indefinitely and continue to spawn 我们可以看到这将无限循环并继续生成 We have our spawn rate set to 15 我们的生成速率设置为15 meaning that we'll spawn 15 particles every second 这意味着我们每秒会生成15个粒子 We've got a lifetime between 12 and 15. The color is unaffected 我们的寿命在12到15之间。颜色不受影响 We're spawning them from a small shape 我们从一个小形状中生成它们 a sphere with a radius of 300 meters and we can start to see it's a pretty big 一个半径为300米的球体，我们可以开始看到它是一个相当大的球体 sphere and it's randomly spawning from different points within that sphere 球体，并且它从该球体内的不同点随机生成 And then we have a couple of forces at play here 然后我们在这里有一些力量作用 The main one is obviously our gravity force 主要的力量显然是重力力量 We have a wind force 我们有一个风力 which is blowing it in this direction and hidden inside this wind force 它是朝这个方向吹的，并且隐藏在这个风力中 we're getting a little bit of curl noise turbulence 我们得到了一点卷曲噪声湍流 We have some aerodynamic drag 我们有一些空气动力学阻力 which is helping give it some fluttering and also preventing the fastest 这有助于使其有些颤动，同时也阻止了最快的运动 particles from moving too fast 粒子移动得太快 And then we also have collision 然后我们还有碰撞 So if I move this towards the ground 所以如果我把这个向下移动 you'll see that these actually do start to collide and slide across the surface 你会看到它们实际上开始碰撞并在表面上滑动 just like leaves or pieces of paper would do 就像树叶或纸片一样 So this has done a lot of heavy lifting from these initial settings 所以这些初始设置已经做了很多工作 So now let's just swap out this material and add in some controls to turn these 现在让我们只是更换这个材质，并添加一些控制来旋转它们 blowing confetti particles into blowing leaves 将彩带粒子变成飞舞的树叶 So in order to create a material for our sprite here 所以为了为我们的精灵创建一个材质 we're going to have to modify our master material that we built earlier so that 我们将不得不修改我们之前构建的主材质 it can have some particle nodes inside of it so that we can communicate to 它可以在内部有一些粒子节点，以便我们可以进行通信 Niagara specifically so that we can pick one of these four leaf textures 尼亚加拉特别是我们可以选择这四种树叶纹理之一 per particle 每个粒子 So let's grab our master material MM surface master and let's copy it into 所以让我们拿起我们的主材质MM表面主材质，然后将其复制到 our Niagara folder 我们的尼亚加拉文件夹中 And then once it's in here 然后一旦它在这里 we'll rename this to particle underscore sub UV 我们将把它重命名为粒子下划线子UV And just so we can start to preview things live in our scene 这样我们就可以开始在场景中实时预览了 let's create that material instance right away 让我们立即创建该材质实例 So delete the underscore INST at the end and just change our prefix 所以删除末尾的下划线INST，只需更改前缀 And then let's assign that to our sprite renderer at the bottom of our screen 然后让我们将其分配给我们屏幕底部的精灵渲染器 A lot of times it'll offer ways to fix our issue 很多时候它会提供解决我们问题的方法 Essentially the problem here is that we're using a GPU sim and for 基本上，这里的问题是我们正在使用GPU模拟器，而对于 GPU sims to calculate collision GPU模拟器来计算碰撞 it needs to use the depth channel 它需要使用深度通道 If I change this over to CPU 如果我将其更改为CPU that'll fix it 那样就解决了 But the main point here is that Niagara will typically flag and offer 但这里的主要问题是尼亚加拉通常会标记并提供 suggestions on how to fix our different properties 如何修复我们的不同属性的建议 So for now we'll stick with that and now let's go into our master material 所以现在我们将坚持这一点，现在让我们进入我们的主材质 and start to modify this 并开始修改它 So we need to do two things to this material 所以我们需要对这个材质做两件事情 we need to give it an alpha channel 我们需要给它添加一个透明通道 So we can use this black and white mask to cut out our leaves 这样我们可以使用这个黑白遮罩来剪切出我们的叶子 And the other thing is we need to create some sub UV controls 另一件事是我们需要创建一些子UV控制器 So we know that each particle is going to pick one of these four possible 这样我们就知道每个粒子将选择这四个可能之一 So the way that we would add transparency to this is we'd have to change our 所以我们要给这个添加透明度的方法是需要改变我们的 material options 材质选项 So if you click on the brown material box here 所以如果你点击这里的棕色材质框 we still want this to be a surface 我们仍然希望这是一个表面 but when we set this to opaque 但是当我们将其设置为不透明时 it doesn't give us any opacity options 它不给我们任何不透明度选项 So we can either make this masked or translucent 所以我们可以将其设置为遮罩或半透明 The only difference between masked and translucent is translucent can have half 遮罩和半透明之间唯一的区别是半透明可以有一半 transparent objects 透明物体 So you could have an opacity of 50% and you'd be able to see through it 所以你可以有50%的不透明度，你可以透过它看到里面 We're masked 我们是遮罩 We'll take anything that's at one in your alpha channel and make it opaque 我们将把你的透明通道中为1的部分变为不透明 And it'll take anything less than one and make it transparent 而小于1的部分将变为透明 So it kind of hits your transparency with a hammer and doesn't allow for any 所以它像用锤子敲打你的透明度，不允许有任何 half transparent objects 半透明物体 But in the case of these leaves here 但是在这些叶子的情况下 we're not going to see them super up close 我们不会看到它们非常近 We probably want masked instead of translucent because we don't need that half 我们可能希望使用遮罩而不是半透明，因为我们不需要那种半透明的效果 transparent look 透明的外观 So in this case 所以在这种情况下 we're going to have an opacity mask input 我们将有一个不透明度遮罩输入 if this was set to translucent 如果这个设置为半透明 we would have an opacity input 我们将有一个不透明度输入 I like to hook this up where we'll plug in the controls to both just in case we 我喜欢将这两者都连接起来，以防万一我们要将控制器插入其中 ever decide to change this later 以后如果决定更改这个 but we're going to change this blend mode to masked and we'll hit save 但我们将把这个混合模式更改为遮罩，并保存 And if I disable real time here 如果我在这里禁用实时 it'll freeze our particles in the viewport 它将会在视口中冻结我们的粒子 And now we can see the four different leaves that we're getting from our alpha 现在我们可以看到从我们的alpha通道获取的四片不同的叶子 So now that's working 所以现在它正常工作了 but now let's fix this 但现在让我们来修复这个 So we're only seeing one leaf per particle and we're picking from our sub UV 所以我们每个粒子只能看到一片叶子，并且我们是从我们的子UV中选择的 sprite sheet 精灵表 So what we'll have to do is we can't use a texture sample here because this 所以我们要做的是在这里不能使用纹理采样，因为这个 doesn't talk to our Niagara system 不能与我们的Niagara系统通信 We'll have to use one of our particle nodes 我们必须使用我们的粒子节点之一 So let's scroll down until we find texture sample parameter sub UV 所以让我们滚动下去，直到找到纹理采样参数子UV So this is the same as our texture sample parameters 所以这与我们的纹理采样参数相同 but it's specifically made to talk to our Niagara system 但它是专门用来与我们的Niagara系统通信的 So we'll call this alpha sub UV 所以我们将其称为alpha子UV And now let's plug this into our opacity and opacity mask inputs 现在让我们将其插入到我们的不透明度和不透明度遮罩输入中 and delete our old texture sample 并删除我们的旧纹理采样 And I'm also going to assign the base color normals and roughness to our 我还将把基础颜色、法线和粗糙度分配给我们的 leaves so we can see everything in context 叶子，这样我们就可以在上下文中看到所有内容 So now I've plugged in our UVs 所以现在我已经插入了我们的UV and that's everything we need to do inside of our material 这就是我们在材质内需要做的一切 Now let's hop back into our Niagara system and make some final adjustments 现在让我们返回到我们的Niagara系统，进行一些最后的调整 So let's look at our different stages here 所以让我们来看看这里的不同阶段 We have emitter update 我们有发射器更新 which spawns our particles 它生成我们的粒子 We have particle spawn 我们有粒子生成 which is where we set the properties of the particles upon spawning 这是我们在生成时设置粒子属性的地方 And then we have particle update 然后我们有粒子更新 which updates our particle every single tick 它会在每个时刻更新我们的粒子 where would you think we need to put a sub UV module to decide what sub UV we 你认为我们应该把子UV模块放在哪里来决定我们要看到哪个子UV？ want to see when we're spawning 我们生成时想要看到什么？ That'll be under our particle spawn settings 那将在我们的粒子生成设置下面。 So we'll have to do two things under particle spawn 所以我们在粒子生成下面要做两件事情。 Let's create a sub UV animation module 让我们创建一个子UV动画模块。 And this is going to throw some errors at us at first 而且一开始会给我们抛出一些错误。 This is usually used in the particle update section by default 这通常默认用于粒子更新部分。 The settings that you get by default are assuming it's under particle update 默认的设置假定它在粒子更新下面。 but we can change some things around 但我们可以改变一些东西。 So instead of having the sub UV animation set to linear or it'll transform over 所以我们可以将子UV动画设置为线性，或者它会随着时间改变。 we can change this to random or it'll randomly set a sprite upon 我们可以将其更改为随机，或者它会随机设置一个精灵。 So we need to start an end frame to be between zero and three or between one 所以我们需要设置起始帧和结束帧在0到3之间或者在1之间。 we're starting with zero and then let's select our sprite render for the source 我们从0开始，然后选择我们的精灵渲染器作为源。 render at the bottom here 在这里底部渲染。 And for evaluation type 而且对于评估类型 we're going to set this to spawn only 我们将把它设置为仅生成。 And if you look at this 如果你看一下这个 it's still not working because we have one more setting to change at the bottom 它还不起作用，因为我们还有一个设置要在底部更改。 inside of our sprite render 在我们的精灵渲染器内部 There's a sub UV section here 这里有一个子UV部分 which you'll need to update 你需要更新 If you ever use sub UVs 如果你曾经使用过子UV we don't need blending enabled because this is used for a sequence 我们不需要启用混合，因为这是用于序列的 but we do need to tell it to use a sub UV image of a two by two grid 但我们需要告诉它使用一个2x2网格的子UV图像 And now we have everything working correctly 现在一切都正常工作了 Now if I scale up our size here 现在如果我在这里调整尺寸 just so we can really see these leaves 这样我们就可以真正看到这些叶子了 we can see they're starting to work 我们可以看到它们开始工作了 But one other problem we get is that these are set to one sided materials 但我们还遇到一个问题，这些材质设置为单面材质 So as the last thing to update 所以作为最后一个要更新的内容 we'll go back to our master material and check this two sided checkbox and press 我们将返回到我们的主材质，并勾选这个双面材质的复选框，然后按下 And now the leaves are huge 现在叶子变得很大 So the behavior won't make quite as much sense 所以行为就不会那么有意义了 but just so that we can see how they start to spawn and we can see they have a 但是这样我们就可以看到它们如何开始生成，我们可以看到它们有一个 pretty believable behavior 相当可信的行为 whether we wanted to hang them up falling from a tree or towards the ground as 无论我们是想把它们挂在树上掉落还是朝着地面 if they're blowing across a park or something like that 如果它们在公园里吹来吹去之类的 Now we have a fully functioning Niagara system that we can use to plus up our 现在我们有一个完全运行的尼亚加拉系统，我们可以用来增强我们的 environments and add some animation and movement into our shots 环境，并在我们的镜头中添加一些动画和运动 So to prepare these leaf textures 所以为了准备这些叶子纹理 I found this scan off of texturescom 我在textures.com上找到了这个扫描图 So you can download this for free 所以你可以免费下载这个 The free version of this is just a 512 by 512 image 免费版本只是一个512x512的图像 But for our purposes right now 但是现在对于我们的目的来说 that will definitely be enough just so we can see how this works together when 那绝对足够了，这样我们就可以看到这个是如何一起工作的 creating assets 创建资产 So I've downloaded these and now let's bring them into 所以我已经下载了这些，现在让我们把它们带入 So what we have to do is create a four by four grid so that we can give Niagara 所以我们要做的是创建一个4x4的网格，这样我们就可以给尼亚加拉 really specific proportions 非常具体的比例 So it knows how to pick each one of these leaves and use a different leaf per 这样它就知道如何挑选每一片叶子并使用不同的叶子 So right now the resolution of this is 1024 by 1024 所以现在这个的分辨率是1024x1024 which means each square will be 512 by 512. 这意味着每个正方形都是512x512。 So now I'm just going to select this leaf on the top left and right click and 现在我只需要选择左上角的这片叶子，然后右键点击 make a layer via copy 通过复制创建一个图层 And then if I control click on this layer 然后，如果我按住控制键点击这个图层 it'll create the same selection I had before 它会创建与之前相同的选择 And I'm just going to duplicate this for all of the different channels for our 我只是要为我们的所有不同通道复制这个 our albedo and our alpha channels 反照率和透明通道 So now if I hide the rest 现在，如果我隐藏其他部分 I have this one leaf that I can line up to be the center of our top left square 我有这片叶子，可以对齐成为我们左上角方块的中心 But now let's do this for each of our three squares 现在，让我们对我们的三个方块做同样的操作
evidences.speaker: instructor

evidences.content: Now we have them lined up in a four by four grid 现在，我们将它们排列在一个四乘四的网格中 So now let's just prep these so that we can render out each channel on their own 现在，让我们准备一下，这样我们就可以分别渲染出每个通道 So for our alpha channel 所以对于我们的透明通道 we just need to make sure that the background is completely black and then we 我们只需要确保背景完全是黑色，然后我们 can export this 可以导出这个 And if I know these are just going to be used inside of Unreal 而且如果我知道这些只会在虚幻引擎中使用 it's good practice to put that prefix in the file name itself 在文件名中加入前缀是一个好习惯 And then you don't have to worry about this when importing your textures 这样你在导入纹理时就不用担心这个了 So now we have our roughness and then we can just sample a background color 现在我们有了粗糙度，然后我们可以采样一个背景颜色 here or just set it to 05 在这里或者设置为0.5 by default 默认情况下 Now for our normal 现在，对于我们的法线 we'll make sure the R and G channels are set to zero and we'll set our B to 我们将确保R和G通道设置为零，将B设置为 255 and then we'll paste here and do the same for our base color 255，然后我们将粘贴在这里，并对我们的基色做同样的操作 And one thing that I would like to do just to give us more of a reason to have 还有一件事我想做的，这样我们就有更多的理由 these different leaf shapes 这些不同的叶子形状 it could be a cool idea to really tint one or two of these to be a different 将其中一两个真正着色成不同的颜色可能是个好主意 color than green 与绿色不同的颜色 So we can make them yellow or red like it's in the fall or like the leaves are 所以我们可以让它们变成秋天的黄色或红色，就像树叶一样 just slightly dying 稍微凋零 So I'm just going to take a hue correct and just mask in one of the leaves here 所以我只是要取一个色调校正，然后在这里遮罩其中一片叶子 So I'll just pick the bottom left 所以我只是要选择左下角的部分
evidences.speaker: instructor
